title: postgresql security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[13.23-1]
- Update to 13.23
- Resolves: RHEL-128812 (CVE-2025-12818)

[13.22-3]
- Add sysusers configuration and complete tmpfiles.d dynamically
- Related: RHEL-94905

[13.22-2]
- Define tmpfiles.d to enable ostree and bootc support
full_text:
[13.23-1]
- Update to 13.23
- Resolves: RHEL-128812 (CVE-2025-12818)

[13.22-3]
- Add sysusers configuration and complete tmpfiles.d dynamically
- Related: RHEL-94905

[13.22-2]
- Define tmpfiles.d to enable ostree and bootc support

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0491.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-12817.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-12818.html
